I found an amazing, well-paid job, far beyond what I had expected, all with Jake’s support. I also entered a happy relationship, moved into the flat I had always dreamed of, started travelling the world, and gained a deeper understanding of myself. The journey has been truly transformative.

featured_testimonial.title: Business Change Manager at London’s Leading Law Firm

problem_solution.industry_standard: Generic Motivation and Hand-Holding Pep Talks

pain_points.title: Chasing inspiration
pain_points.description: You waste hours waiting for the right feeling instead of building systems, leaving you chasing motivation without getting results.

pain_points.title: Drifting without direction
pain_points.description: You work around the clock without clear strategic milestones, leaving you feeling stuck or drifting without direction.

pain_points.title: The middle phase collapse
pain_points.description: You lose momentum when the initial excitement fades, leaving you struggling with the brutal and boring middle grind.

pain_points.title: Isolation at the top
pain_points.description: You hesitate on high-stakes decisions due to a lack of unfiltered feedback, leaving you lacking confidence and self-belief.

solution.description: A complete performance architecture built on brutal truth and relentless execution. This system replaces fleeting motivation with automated protocols and structured progress to make victory a mathematical certainty.
deliverables: Vision GPS for Your Strategic Command Center
The 10-80-10 Rule to Fuel Your Grind
No 0% Days as Your Daily Execution Protocol
The Brutal Truth Audit for Your Performance Baseline

is_for: Entrepreneurs who want to scale their companies without losing control.
Founders who need to automate discipline and eliminate execution gaps.
Executives who want to negotiate high-value board roles with total authority.
Ambitious professionals who refuse to settle for average industry standards.
A-players who expect to be held to an extremely high standard of execution.
is_not_for: People looking for quick motivation hacks or endless pep talks.
Individuals who want therapy dressed up as high-performance coaching.
Those who prioritize personal comfort over brutal truth and growth.
Professionals who are unwilling to invest time and effort into daily execution.
Anyone looking for a passive hand-holding arrangement instead of a partnership.

testimonials.quote: Jake is a fantastic coach who gets to the core of the issues excellently. He helped me to take drastic steps (they were needed!), which brought me a massive shift in my business and my family life. Now, I work less, earn double that I used to and have more time for my kids. What I like about Jake is that he can be straightforward if needed and when necessary. He is not afraid to ask the difficult (fundamental) questions when the situation calls for them. An outstanding return on investment! Thank you, Jake. See you again soon.

Thank you so much. You are a huge inspiration, Jake!

testimonials.quote: Jake helped me change my life when I felt lost. I decided to work with him because I wanted to change my career path. testimonials.quote: There aren’t any words that could describe how much Jake has supported me through his coaching. His knowledge, experience, and professionalism are to be admired. He will always go the extra mile to help you achieve your goals. The new approach and tools I now have, enable me to have a much stronger focus and plan to action in achieving my deepest dreams. I also like his (sometimes brutal) honesty and speaking the “truth”, exactly how it is. Only a coach can tell you what you have to fix to get better results. He doesn’t just cheerlead his clients through the highs, but also through the challenges. I decided to extend his services to another few months for other problems and goals. I look forward to working with you again and again.

about.name: Jake Smolarek
about.notable_achievement: Coached CEOs scaling companies from £80M to £140M
paragraphs: I forged my high-performance standard over two decades in the trenches. I watched countless brilliant founders and executives drift, chasing fleeting motivation while their competitors executed. I knew there had to be a systematic way to build consistency without relying on how you feel on any given morning.

With over 17 years and 27,000+ hours of coaching experience, I have partnered with more than 1,500 clients globally. My credentials include helping CEOs scale companies from £80M to £140M and guiding executives to negotiate £500k board roles. This is not theory. It is a battle-tested architecture built on brutal truth.

If you are ready to stop looking for comfort and start engineering real results, let us talk. This complimentary initial consultation session is where we map out your execution protocol. No endless pep talks, just a direct strategy to make your progress non-negotiable.

faqs.q: Is this just another motivational coaching program?
faqs.a: No. I do not build motivation. I engineer results. This is a structured operating system built on execution protocols, not hand-holding pep talks.

faqs.q: What is expected of me during this partnership?
faqs.a: I work with A-players who demand execution. You must be willing to face brutal truths, implement daily protocols, and hold yourself to an extremely high standard.

faqs.q: How much time does this require daily?
faqs.a: The system is designed to save you time by automating discipline. Protocols like No 0% Days integrate directly into your current workflow to eliminate wasted hours.

faqs.q: Who is this coaching partnership not suitable for?
faqs.a: This is not for people who want comfort, passive advice, or therapy dressed up as coaching. If you are not ready to take drastic steps, this is not for you.

faqs.q: What happens during the complimentary consultation session?
faqs.a: We analyze your current performance bottlenecks and map out a custom blueprint using the Operating System for Winning. No pitch, just strategy.

final_cta.urgency: Only 3 consultation slots remaining this week
final_cta.headline: Install Your Operating System for Winning Today
final_cta.subtext: One-to-one partnership is strictly reserved for a select, ambitious few who are ready to execute.
final_cta.guarantee_text: If you feel this initial consultation session was not highly valuable, we will immediately part ways with no hard feelings.
